channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: bet365 Bonus Code: Bet $5, Get $150 with Code FOX365
item.description: Claim the bet365 Sportsbook promo code which give you $150 in bonus bets.

item.title: Daytona 500 Starting Lineup: See the Starting Positions for Every Driver in 2026
item.description: Check out the starting lineup for the 2026 Daytona 500 with Kyle Busch on the pole.

item.title: Best Sportsbook Promos & Bonus Bets - February 2026 Top Offers
item.description: Discover the best sportsbook promos and bonus bets for February 2026. Compare welcome offers and top bonuses from leading betting sites.

item.title: FanDuel Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $100 in Bonus Bets If Your Bet Wins
item.description: Bet $5 or more, get $100 back in bonus bets if your bet wins with our FanDuel sportsbook offer for new users.

item.title: College Basketball Games of the Week: Men's, Women's No. 1 Teams In Action
item.description: Here are top men's and women's basketball games going down this weekend around the league.

item.title: Weekend preview: Ronaldo's return; Inter-Juve in to decide title?
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo ends his protest of PIF, while the 255th Derby d'Italia has big implications.

item.title: Men's Bracketology: Don't sleep on this year's bubble
item.description: The Last Four In and First Four Out groupings feature teams with big wins -- and high potential for March.

item.title: Premier League superlatives: The 25 best and worst players at different skills
item.description: Who's the Premier League's fastest player? The slowest? Best passer? The worst? And more. Here are 25 superlatives from different skills.

item.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Virginia Tech gets biggest victory yet with Clemson upset
item.description: Another ranked upset adds more intrigue to the race for the NCAA tournament.

item.title: Purpose and togetherness: What the soccer world can learn from FA Cup heroes Macclesfield
item.description: Macclesfield produced one of soccer's greatest Cinderella stories in beating Crystal Palace in the FA Cup, but the tale behind the triumph is even mor...
